headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +12.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 68% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly increased (z=2.18)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears leads today but with a notably low score of -41.4, driven by 41 quotes that are mostly moderate or mild — only 1 strong-intensity quote means little score-boosting is happening.
• This is near the bottom of the 170-day range for Fears (-50.2 to 69.7), suggesting fear sentiment is quieter than usual rather than elevated.
• Frustrations dropped sharply from yesterday's high of 81.2 to 20.9, despite still carrying 84 strong-intensity quotes — volume appears to have pulled back significantly.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
